sourceMovie.title: Avengers: Infinity War
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Avengers: Infinity War for the same reason it broke through in 2018: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a action rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Joe Russo keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The adventure and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Avengers
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Avengers: Infinity War clicked for you, The Avengers (2012) is a strong next stop: both trade in adventure and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Avengers: Infinity War?
faq.answer: Try The Avengers, Guardians of the Galaxy, Captain America: Civil War—each shares DNA with Avengers: Infinity War while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Avengers: Infinity War?
faq.answer: Avengers: Infinity War (2018) is best described as Adventure, Action, Science Fiction. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Avengers: Infinity War part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "The Avengers Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
